decision_metadata.llm_enrichment_rationale: Step 4 tier classification remains robust (n=96, Wilson lower 0.8815, +35.5pp edge over UP_TRI baseline) with promotion correctly capped at Tier M/TAKE_SMALL given R-multiple 0.61. Cohort is regime-gated to Bear while current regime is Choppy (stable, 7 days) with 100% Choppy exposure across 14 open positions, so activation is deferred and the existing concentration is not compounded. Consistent with continuous prior approvals of this exact cohort (2026-04-29 through 2026-05-27) and no trader rejection on record.
